questions.scenario: A new environment variable was added and Cloud Run created `orders-api-00042`. What is `00042`?

options.text: An immutable revision snapshot of service code and configuration.

questions.explanation: A revision records a versioned snapshot created when code or configuration changes.

questions.scenario: A revision exists but receives zero traffic. What is true?

options.text: Creating a revision and serving user traffic from it are separate decisions.
A revision with zero traffic must be deleted immediately.
Zero traffic proves the container image is invalid.

questions.explanation: A revision can be created for inspection before traffic is moved to it.

questions.scenario: Which facts are useful when a Cloud Run rollout fails?

options.text: The image and configuration in that revision.
Only the local developer's shell history.

questions.explanation: Revision evidence makes rollbacks and comparisons concrete.
